title: AgentHook Event Envelope
description: JSON Schema for the AgentHook event envelope, SPEC v0.2 section 1.

schema_version.description: Wire-format version. Bumped only on breaking envelope changes.

event_type.description: Canonical event type, or an additional PascalCase event type permitted by SPEC section 2.

timestamp.description: When the event was emitted, ISO 8601 UTC.

source.description: Publisher family, e.g. claude-code, amp, hermes, cursor, cody, openai-agents-sdk.

action.description: Publisher-agnostic operation being attempted, e.g. read, write, edit, execute, query, search, send, open, publish.

resource_kind.description: Publisher-agnostic resource class, e.g. file, directory, shell, database, url, email, repository, package.

resource.description: Canonical resource target for policy and audit. Use a string for simple targets or an object for composite targets.

resource_scope.description: Scope of the target, e.g. local, workspace, remote, public_web, internal_network, tenant, production, unknown.

operation_risk.description: Advisory risk label for the attempted operation, e.g. sensitive_read, destructive_write, external_transfer, publication.
